config.title: xcsh

config.confirmDelete.description: 刪除資源前顯示確認對話方塊
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.descripti: 根據操作危險程度決定何時顯示刪除確認
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.always: 所有刪除操作均顯示確認對話方塊
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.highOnly: 僅對高風險刪除操作顯示確認
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.never: 永不顯示確認對話方塊（請謹慎使用）
config.autoRefreshInterval.description: 自動重新整理間隔（秒）（設為 0 可停用）
config.viewMode.description: 資源顯示模式：'console' 顯示如 F5 Console 的精簡輸出，'full' 顯示完整 API 回應
config.showPreviewApis.description: 在檔案總管中顯示預覽/測試版 API。預覽 API 會標示徽章。
config.xcsh.enabled.description: 啟用 xcsh Shell 助理整合
config.xcsh.path.description: xcsh 執行檔的自訂路徑。留空以自動偵測。
config.xcsh.chatParticipant.description: 將 @xcsh 註冊為 Copilot Chat 參與者
config.xcsh.languageModel.description: 將 xcsh 註冊為 VS Code 語言模型提供者
config.xcsh.autoStart.description: 擴充功能啟動時自動啟動 xcsh 處理程序
config.xcsh.defaultModel.description: xcsh 工作階段的預設 AI 模型
config.xcsh.thinkingLevel.description: xcsh AI 回應的思考層級
config.xcsh.panelMode.description: xcsh 面板體驗：豐富的網頁檢視或傳統 CLI 終端機

config.xcsh.panelMode.terminal: 傳統 CLI 終端機體驗

chat.xcsh.description: Ask about F5 Distributed Cloud resources, configuration, and troubleshooting via xcsh
chat.xcsh.command.status: Show xcsh integration health and connection status
chat.xcsh.command.context: Show active xcsh context details (tenant, namespace, API URL)
chat.xcsh.command.resources: List resources in the current namespace
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.networking: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud networking, load balancers, origin pools, routes, DNS, CDN, virtual hosts, and HTTP load balancer configuration
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.security: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud security, WAF policies, service policies, DDoS protection, bot defense, API security, and application firewall configuration
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.infrastructure: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud sites, site health, cloud connectors, network connectors, fleet management, and infrastructure status
